companies.name: PROCID
companies.shortDescription:
PROCID. PROCID is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. PROCID is a creator of vision solutions, specializing in industrial control, robotic guiding, traceability, identification, mobility applications, and impression and marquage. They have over 35 years of experience in industrial vision and use artificial intelligence to detect and classify anomalies without the need for specific descriptions. PROCID employs 4 people (+16.7% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2014. Headquartered in France.
[...]
PROCID est spécialisée dans la fourniture et l'intégration de solutions de traçabilité professionnelle et de vision industrielle.
[...]
Basée à proximité de Nancy, PROCID regroupe une équipe d’ingénieurs et de techniciens confirmés, s’appuyant sur une expérience réussie de plus de vingt ans dans les domaines de la Traçabilité et de la Vision Industrielle.
[...]
PROCID propose des solutions, qui vont de la fourniture matérielle, ou du développement logiciel, à la réalisation d'un système complet clé en main.
[...]
PROCID s'adresse non seulement aux secteurs industriel, logistique et tertiaire, mais aussi aux intégrateurs d'automatismes et constructeurs de machines ou d'équipements, désireux de faire confiance à un partenaire spécialisé.
[...]

Technique de contrôle industriel en automatique,

companies.name: IRIS Inspection machines
companies.shortDescription:
IRIS Inspection machines. IRIS Inspection machines is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. IRIS Inspection machines is a company that specializes in the production of intelligent body inspection machines. They offer a range of products including smart machines for body inspection, defect identification, and trend analysis. The company focuses on reducing human intervention and providing a user-friendly format for their machines. They aim to improve productivity and reduce dependence on human intervention. IRIS Inspection machines employs 31 people (+2.5% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2002. Headquartered in France, with presence in India. Has $1.6M in total funding.
[...]
Our ambition is to be the most trusted supplier of glass inspection systems to the packaging industry using glass containers. As a leader in technology, we anticipate customer needs and provide long term and cost efficient support for our solutions in the field of glass quality control. This long term partnership with our customers is the key for a sustainable development of our company.
[...]
With more than 15% of the company turnover reinvested in Research and Development every year, development the IRIS Team is constantly working on the future versions of software of tomorrow’s EVOLUTION Machines with a challenge: to increase the precision of hollow glass inspection and detection of defects in order t

companies.name: XT
companies.shortDescription:
XT-VISION. XT-VISION is a Machinery Manufacturing company. XT Vision is a specialist in quality control by industrial vision. They provide services in packaging bottles. XT-VISION employs 4 people (+14.3% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2011. Headquartered in France.

XT-Vision est une société française, experte dans la fabrication de machines de contrôle qualité par caméras. Nos ingénieurs développent des systèmes de vision pour répondre aux problématiques de non-conformité de votre production.
